titleStmt.title: Northern doorpost of western gate of west gopura of Prasat Kracap (K. 183-12), 850 Śaka

licence.p: This work is licenced under the Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 Unported Licence. To view a copy of the licence, visit https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/ or send a letter to Creative Commons, 444 Castro Street, Suite 900, Mountain View, California, 94041, USA.

handDesc.p: The lettering is characteristic of the tenth century CE.

projectDesc.p: The project DHARMA has received funding from the European Research Council (ERC) under the European Union's Horizon 2020 research and innovation programme (grant agreement no 809994).

prefixDef.p: Public URIs with the prefix bib to point to a Zotero Group Library named ERC-DHARMA whose data are open to the public.
Internal URIs using the part prefix to point to person elements in the DHARMA_IdListMembers_v01.xml file.

div.p:
qnak· kāmaru sot· pra[mān·] - - - - gh(o)
khñuṁ gho kaṁ(v)van· gho ka(nteṅ·) - - - - vyā-
pi gho kaṁp(ur)· CCor· gho ti - - - -t·
gho kan·(lān·) gvāl· kan(·)saC[·] ..................... qna-
p· tai kan·(tv)an· tai kaṁpur· [t](ai) - - gh(o)
tai kaṁvrau tai chke tai krau - - -p·
tai pit· so tai kanses· tai - - t(ai)
phn(o)s· lap· kaṁpit· tai Utpa[la] kva(n·) - (4)
tai bhāva tai kañ·chāy· - - so-
(t)· kvan· 2 tai kaṁprvat· kvan· - - - ka
- Ā kvan· 4 tai bhadra tai - - - (tva-)
n· gvāl· 2 gho kanloñ· - - - vā-
ñ· gho chke gho krau - - - -
kṣa gho sneha gho phlū - - - -
gho laṅveṅ· gho ka - - - kaṁ-
vrau sot· gho kaṁpar· - - - Ī-
śānaśiva gho daiva gho - - gana
kaṁvis· si nu taiya 7 gho (kan)dai (gvā)l·
2 gho panlas· gvāl· kaṁpi[t·] - - (vra)hma-
putra gho pādāgraśiva - - gho pa-
vitra gho śivabheda gho Amr̥ta khvas·
gho kaṁpit· gho kandai gho śivabhā-
va gho kaṁbhat· gho dhavala gho chke
gho khñuṁ gho kaṁvis· gho kandhiguna ka-
ndhi si nu taiya 10 2 tai kan·tvan· tai paṁna(ṅ)·
tai kante(ṅ)· yvān· tai sārasvati khñuṁ 6 tai
10 5 $circleTarget piṇda qnak· ta gi sruk· kāmaru
pramān· Ugra(pura) si 5 gho 100 6 gvāl·
10 6 tai (60 10) lap· 10 6 si rat· 4
tai rat· 6 (si) pau 2 tai pau 10 2
kvan· ta q(yat·) j(ma)ha 10 gana kamvis· si
[nu] tai (7 gana kandhi) si [nu] taiya 10 2

People from the village of Kāmaru B in the region of , Gho Khñuṁ Gho Kaṁvvan, Gho Kanteṅ, , Gho , Gho , Gho , Gvāl , Tai Kanvvan, Tai Kaṁpur, , Tai Kaṁvrau, Tai Chke, Tai Krau, , Tai Pit So, Tai Kanses, Tai , Tai Phnos, Lap Kaṁpit, Tai Utpala accompanied by 4 children, Tai Bhāva, Tai Kañchāy, , another accompanied by 2 children, Tai Kaṁprvat accompanied by children, accompanied by 4 children, Tai Bhadra, Tai , 2 male animal keepers gvāl, Gho Kanloñ, , Gho Chke, Gho Krau, , Gho Sneha, Gho , Gho Laṅveṅ, Gho , another Gho kaṁvrau, Gho Kaṁpar, , Gho Īśānaśiva, Gho Daiva Gho ;
group of Karpvis consisting of seven male and female laborers;

Gho , 2 animal keepers gvāl, Gho Panlas, Gvāl Kaṁpit, Vrahmaputra, another Gho Pādāgraśiva, Gho Pavitra, Gho Śivabheda, Gho Amr̥ta Khvas, Gho Kaṁpit, Gho Kandai, Gho Śivabhāva, Gho Kaṁbhat, Gho Dhavala, Gho Chke, Gho Khñuṁ, Gho Kaṁvis, Gho Kandhi;
group of Kandhi consisting of 12 male and female laborers;

Tai Kantvan, Tai Pan-u, Tai Kanteṅ Yvān, Tai Sārasvati; 6 slaves khñuṁ, 15 female slaves tai. Total number of the people from the village of Kāmaru in the region of Ugrapura: 5 male slaves si, 106 male slaves gho, 16 animal keepers gvāl, 70 female slaves tai, 16 male slaves lap, 4 boys at the age of running si rat, 6 girls at the age of running tai rat, 2 baby boys si pau, 12 baby girls tai pau, 10 children without names, 7 people from Kamvis, 12 people from Kandhi.

First edited by Kunthea Chhom (123-124) with English translation. Re-edited in French by Claude Jacques without translation (144). Re-edited again in French by Eric Bourdonneau et al. (nd, unpublished). Re-edited here by Kunthea Chhom based on EFEO estampage n. 823-N.
